final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing logo for a tech-lifestyle content creator brand covering new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods.

Style/medium: clean flat vector logo, modern minimalist, universal cross-cultural appeal, Apple-inspired restraint
Subject: abstract geometric mark suggesting motion/energy and digital connection, paired with a neutral monogram or abstract symbol
Composition: centered mark with generous padding, balanced negative space, symmetrical or near-symmetrical layout
Color palette: neutral base (deep navy or charcoal) with one accent color (electric blue or sage green), high contrast for small sizes
Constraints: must read clearly at 32x32 avatar size; monochrome version must work without color; avoid symbols with religious, political, or cultural specific meanings
Avoid: national flags, religious symbols, hand gestures, animal depictions that carry cultural baggage, gender-specific imagery, text in any specific language, gradients, complex illustrations, Behance generic tech style
